name: Parse sensor
Format CSV line
Split to chart points
MQTT Out (data)
Publish Canonical MQTT Live
db_function
func:
let p = msg.payload || {};

// use wall-clock time for DB primary key
const ts = Date.now();

function sqlNum(v) {
    return (v === undefined || v === null || v === "" || Number.isNaN(Number(v)))
        ? "NULL"
        : Number(v);
}

function sqlBool(v) {
    if (v === true || v === 1 || v === "1") return 1;
    if (v === false || v === 0 || v === "0") return 0;
    return "NULL";
}

function sqlText(v) {
    if (v === undefined || v === null || v === "") return "NULL";
    return "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
}

// compatibility values for older dashboard/queries
let compat_t = sqlNum(p.temp_f);
let compat_h = sqlNum(p.rh_pct);

// Use canonical soil_avg_pct from Final Live Payload (hw-aware, fault-aware)
let compat_soil = p.soil_avg_pct;

let controllerFault = (p.fault === undefined || p.fault === null || Number.isNaN(Number(p.fault)))
    ? 0
    : Number(p.fault);

let faultCount = Number(p.fault_count || 0);
let systemFault = Number(p.system_fault || 0);

msg.topic =
  "INSERT INTO greenhouse_samples (" +
  "ts, t1, t2, tavg, h1, h2, havg, soil, lux, " +
  "louvre_pct, louvre_state, fan_pct, lightOn, fault_count, system_fault, " +
  "mode, irrigation_mode, temp_f, rh_pct, tank_temp_f, " +
  "soil1_raw, soil1_pct, soil2_raw, soil2_pct, soil3_raw, soil3_pct, soil4_raw, soil4_pct, " +
  "batt_v, pv_v, pv_present, louvre_pos_pct, " +
  "row1, row2, row3, row4, row1_en, row2_en, row3_en, row4_en, " +
  "row1_ms, row2_ms, row3_ms, row4_ms, " +
  "row1_start_pct, row2_start_pct, row3_start_pct, row4_start_pct, " +
  "row1_stop_pct, row2_stop_pct, row3_stop_pct, row4_stop_pct, " +
  "pump_on, heater_on, light_on, fan_pwm, " +
  "rows_run_active, rows_run_auto, active_row, " +
  "temp_open_f, temp_close_f, rh_open_pct, " +
  "tank_heat_on_f, tank_heat_off_f, schedule_interval_ms, eco_mode, controller_fault" +
  ") VALUES (" +
  sqlNum(ts) + ", " +

  compat_t + ", " + compat_t + ", " + compat_t + ", " +
  compat_h + ", " + compat_h + ", " + compat_h + ", " +
  sqlNum(compat_soil) + ", " + sqlNum(p.lux) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.louvre_pos_pct) + ", " +
  sqlText(p.louvre_state) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.fan_pct !== undefined ? p.fan_pct : p.fan_pwm) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.light_on) + ", " +

  sqlNum(faultCount) + ", " +
  sqlNum(systemFault) + ", " +

  sqlText(p.mode) + ", " +
  sqlText(p.irrigation_mode) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.temp_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.rh_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.tank_temp_f) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.soil1_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil1_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil2_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil2_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil3_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil3_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil4_raw) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.soil4_pct) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.batt_v) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.pv_v) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.pv_present) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.louvre_pos_pct) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.row1) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row2) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row3) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row4) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.row1_en) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row2_en) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row3_en) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.row4_en) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.row1_ms) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row2_ms) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row3_ms) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row4_ms) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.row1_start_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row2_start_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row3_start_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row4_start_pct) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.row1_stop_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row2_stop_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row3_stop_pct) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.row4_stop_pct) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.pump_on) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.heater_on) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.light_on) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.fan_pwm) + ", " +

  sqlBool(p.rows_run_active) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.rows_run_auto) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.active_row) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.temp_open_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.temp_close_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.rh_open_pct) + ", " +

  sqlNum(p.tank_heat_on_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.tank_heat_off_f) + ", " +
  sqlNum(p.schedule_interval_ms) + ", " +
  sqlBool(p.eco_mode) + ", " +
  sqlNum(controllerFault) +
  ");";

msg.payload = [];
return msg;

name: Temperature
Humidity
GH Lighting
Soil Row 1
Louvre Status
Fan Speed
Final Live Payload
Fault Status Text
Louvre Command
Fan Command
Light Command
heartbeat
func:
flow.set("arduino_last_rx", Date.now());
return msg;

name: comm watchdog
TX Heartbeat
func:
msg.payload = "HEARTBEAT\n";
return msg;

name: Soil Row 2
Soil Row 3
Soil Row 4
Soil Average
Tank Temp
System Mode
Irrigation Mode
Pump Status
Heater Status
Active Row
Row Run Status
Fault Log
Set Mode Auto
Thresholds Display
Format for WS Dashboard
func:
let p = msg.payload;
if (!p || typeof p !== 'object') return null;

let out = {
    temp:          p.temp_f,
    rh:            p.rh_pct,
    tempExhaust:   p.temp_f,
    tempIntake:    p.temp_f,
    rhExhaust:     p.rh_pct,
    rhIntake:      p.rh_pct,
    lux:           p.lux,
    tankTemp:      p.tank_temp_f,
    soilPct:       [p.soil1_pct, p.soil2_pct, p.soil3_pct, p.soil4_pct],
    valveOn:       [p.row1===true, p.row2===true, p.row3===true, p.row4===true],
    rowEnabled:    [p.row1_en!==false, p.row2_en!==false, p.row3_en!==false, p.row4_en!==false],
    pumpOn:        p.pump_on === true,
    lightOn:       p.light_on === true,
    fanPwm:        p.fan_pwm,
    tankHeaterOn:  p.heater_on === true,
    louvreState:   Number(p.louvre_state_raw),
    louvrePos:     p.louvre_pos_pct,
    mode:          p.mode,
    irrigationMode: p.irrigation_mode,
    rowsRunActive: p.rows_run_active === true,
    activeRowIndex: p.active_row,
    tempOpenF:     p.temp_open_f,
    tempCloseF:    p.temp_close_f,
    ecoMode:       p.eco_mode === true,
    pvPresent:     p.pv_present === true,
    battV:         p.batt_v,
    pvV:           p.pv_v,
    faultBits: (p.fault || 0) | (p.fault_count > 0 ? 512 : 0),
    nrFaults: p.faults || {},
    tankHeatOnF:   p.tank_heat_on_f,
    tankHeatOffF:  p.tank_heat_off_f,
    soilStartPct:  p.row1_start_pct,
    soilStopPct:   p.row1_stop_pct,
    scheduleIntervalMs: p.schedule_interval_ms,
    hw:            p.hw || {},
    rhOpenPct:     p.rh_open_pct,
    rowDurationMs: p.row1_ms,
    rowMaxCycleMs: p.row1_ms ? p.row1_ms * 10 : null,
    commFault:     flow.get('arduino_comm_fault') || 0
};

msg.payload = JSON.stringify(out);
return msg;

name: WS Command → Serial
Hardware Config
enable control
Publish Compact MQTT Edge
func:
let p = msg.payload;
if (!p || typeof p !== "object") return null;

let out = {
    schema: "greenhouse.edge.v1",
    stream: "edge",
    ts: (typeof p.ts === "number") ? p.ts : Date.now(),
    temp_f: p.temp_f,
    rh_pct: p.rh_pct,
    soil_avg_pct: p.soil_avg_pct,
    lux: p.lux,
    mode: p.mode,
    irrigation_mode: p.irrigation_mode,
    louvre_pos_pct: p.louvre_pos_pct,
    louvre_state: p.louvre_state,
    fan_pct: p.fan_pct,
    light_on: p.light_on === true,
    pump_on: p.pump_on === true,
    heater_on: p.heater_on === true,
    active_row: p.active_row,
    rows_run_active: p.rows_run_active === true,
    rows_run_auto: p.rows_run_auto === true,
    system_fault: Number(p.system_fault || 0),
    fault_count: Number(p.fault_count || 0),
    faults: p.faults || {},
    fallback_used: p.fallback_used === true
};

msg.topic = "greenhouse/data/edge";
msg.payload = out;
return msg;
